meaning: n.传统主义(尤指宗教,道德,习俗等方面)
examples: Without the stuffy traditionalism of many of his peers.
The royal shakespeare company is a bastion of traditionalism.
The building's design is an interesting blend of traditionalism and modernism.
Where older generations favoured traditionalism, younger generations consistently push back the frontiers of social norms.
Il Palio is one of very few surviving medieval spectacles of its type in Italy, enduring thanks to the sheer tenacity of Sienese traditionalism.
